span.t-att-style: 'background-color: ' + (player.tier_id.color or '#3498db') + '; color: #fff; padding: 6px 18px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; display: inline-block; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase;'

div.class: auction-single-buttons d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center gap-3 mt-4

div.style: position:fixed; top:0; right:-820px; width:820px; max-width:95vw; height:100vh; z-index:9800; display:flex; flex-direction:column; background:#fff; border-left:3px solid #004080; box-shadow:-6px 0 32px rgba(0,0,50,0.18); transition:right .35s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);

position:absolute; left:-44px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); width:44px; height:130px; background:#004080; border-radius:8px 0 0 8px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; box-shadow:-4px 2px 14px rgba(0,0,50,0.3); z-index:1;

span.style: color:#fff; writing-mode:vertical-rl; transform:rotate(180deg); font-size:0.58rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; opacity:0.9;

div.style: padding:16px 20px; background:#004080; color:#fff; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; flex-shrink:0;

button.style: background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); color:#fff; width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:6px; font-size:1.2rem; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; line-height:1;

div.style: display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:10000; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.65); align-items:center; justify-content:center;
background:#fff; border-radius:14px; padding:36px 28px 28px; max-width:400px; width:92%; box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); text-align:center; font-family:inherit;
width:56px; height:56px; border-radius:50%; background:#fff4f4; border:2px solid #e53935; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin:0 auto 16px; font-size:1.6rem;

div.p: This will set the player to Unsold. You can bring them back to Auction later.

button.style: padding:10px 28px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #ddd; background:#f5f5f5; color:#444; font-size:0.95rem; cursor:pointer; font-weight:500;
padding:10px 28px; border-radius:8px; border:none; background:#e53935; color:#fff; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;

div.style: display:none; position:fixed; bottom:28px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); z-index:10001; color:#fff; padding:12px 28px; border-radius:8px; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:600; box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
